title: Review Culture in Bitcoin Development
description: Bitcoin development relies on independent, adversarial peer review and incremental discussion to catch correctness, security, and compatibility failures before changes are merged.

resources.title: Bitcoin Development Philosophy: Review
resources.notes: Explains the layers of conceptual, proposal, implementation, deployment, and user-adoption review.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Contributing Guide
resources.notes: Practical expectations for proposing, reviewing, testing, and iterating on Bitcoin Core changes.

resources.title: Bitcoin Development Philosophy
resources.notes: Broader context for why independent review, restraint, and incremental consensus matter in Bitcoin development.
